Headline: #35 31st/35th and Eastbound #31 31st Temporary Reroute near 33rd/Rhodes
ShortDescription: 35 31st/35th and EB 31 31st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 33rd/Rhodes.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#35 31st/35th and Eastbound #31 31st buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near 33rd/Rhodes.

#35 31st/35th buses will operate via 35th, Rhodes, 33rd Pl., Cottage Grove and over normal route. 

Eastbound #31 31st buses will operate via 31st, King Drive, 33rd Pl., Cottage Grove, 35th, King Drive, 31st and over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #70 Division Temporary Reroute at Division/Pulaski
ShortDescription: 70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near Division/Pulaski.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#70 Division buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Division, Homan, Grand, Augusta, Pulaski, Division and over the regular route, due to police activity near Division/Pulaski.

Allow extra travel time.
